description: The essence of the Polish immigration experience is captured in interviews with stockyard and steel mill workers in Chicago, a city of 800,000 Poles, more than in any other metropolitan area. Shows Chicago's annual folk fair, which draws 80 different nationalities, and closes with a retired milkman, now a guide at the Polish museum, playing Paderewski's music on Paderewski's piano
subject: Emigration and immigration
title: Destination America:5 -- City of the Big Shoulders
